calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-05-2004 Continued To May-10-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-10-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Prove-Up Hearing.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
David Mendez, Esq., for Plaintiff: Navnit G. Patel
No appearance by the Defendant: Arlis Tyner.
09:35 am. - Plaintiff: Navnit Patel was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Three day notice to pay or quit dtd. 4-5-04-------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at: 905 Columbus Ave., #209, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $3,199.00
No attorney's fees.
Costs per Memo of costs.
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibit.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-10-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Gerard Mendez, Esq. for Plaintiff, Navnit G. Patel

Settlement Conference off calendar. No appearance by Defendant, Arlis Tyner.
Jury demand stricken. Matter proceeds as a Court Trial in Dept. #206 on May 10, 2004, 9:00 am. Parties waive court reporter.
Comm. Sue M. Kaplan (218), Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, No reporter
